chart.name: chart.seo.registration.number.by.month
chart.dataset: SELECT dates.date AS release_month, COALESCE(COUNT(seo_registration.created_on), 0) AS registration_count FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 month')) AS date FROM ( SELECT generate_series(0, 11) AS x ) AS n WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 month')) <= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:toDate)) ) dates LEFT JOIN seo_registration ON dates.date = DATE_TRUNC('month', seo_registration.created_on) AND (seo_registration.archived IS NULL OR seo_registration.archived = false) AND DATE(seo_registration.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND (:fullInfo = true OR seo_registration.ccp = :ccp) GROUP BY release_month ORDER BY release_month;

chart.title: Number of registrations by day
chart.name: chart.seo.registration.number.by.day
chart.dataset: SELECT dates.date AS release_day, COALESCE(COUNT(seo_registration.created_on), 0) AS registration_count FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 day')) AS date FROM ( SELECT generate_series(0, (DATE(:toDate) - DATE(:fromDate))) AS x) AS n WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 day')) <= DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:toDate)) ) dates LEFT JOIN seo_registration ON dates.date = DATE_TRUNC('day', seo_registration.created_on) AND (seo_registration.archived IS NULL OR seo_registration.archived = false) AND DATE(seo_registration.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((seo_registration.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) GROUP BY release_day ORDER BY release_day;

custom.name: custom.registration.number.by.month
custom.title: Number of registrations by month in table format
custom.dataset: SELECT TO_CHAR(dates.date, 'MM/YYYY') AS release_month, COALESCE(COUNT(seo_registration.created_on), 0) AS registration_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 month')) AS date FROM ( SELECT generate_series(0, 11) AS x ) AS n WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 month')) <= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE(:toDate)) ) dates LEFT JOIN seo_registration ON dates.date = DATE_TRUNC('month', seo_registration.created_on) AND (seo_registration.archived IS NULL OR seo_registration.archived = false) AND DATE(seo_registration.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND (:fullInfo = true OR seo_registration.ccp = :ccp) GROUP BY dates.date ORDER BY dates.date;

custom.name: custom.registration.number.by.day
custom.title: Number of registrations by day in table format
custom.dataset: SELECT TO_CHAR(dates.date, 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS release_day, COALESCE(COUNT(seo_registration.created_on), 0) AS registration_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 day')) AS date FROM ( SELECT generate_series(0, (DATE(:toDate) - DATE(:fromDate))) AS x ) AS n WHERE DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:fromDate) + (x * INTERVAL '1 day')) <= DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE(:toDate)) ) dates LEFT JOIN seo_registration ON dates.date = DATE_TRUNC('day', seo_registration.created_on) AND (seo_registration.archived IS NULL OR seo_registration.archived = false) AND DATE(seo_registration.created_on) BETWEEN DATE(:fromDate) AND DATE(:toDate) AND ((seo_registration.ccp = :ccp) OR (:fullInfo = true)) GROUP BY dates.date ORDER BY dates.date;

action-view.name: dashlet.custom.registration.number.by.month.action.view
action-view.title: Number of registrations by month in table format

action-view.name: dashlet.custom.registration.number.by.day.action.view
action-view.title: Number of registrations by day in table format
